command: ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "echo  | base64 -d > /tmp/fix_svc.py && sudo python3 /tmp/fix_svc.py && sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl restart hermes-gateway && sleep 12 && journalctl -u hermes-gateway --since -15s --no-pager 2>/dev/null | tail -12"
